# Winzard service composition verification

## Verification result

The service-composition platform passed the complete Stage 3 verification matrix on 2026-07-22.

Tested source commit: `7b892b04ac71d4188a5be4f9f9d7bc7ed6d9e9dc`.

GitHub Actions runs:

- complete Stage 3 matrix: `29918034459`;
- official Verify workflow: `29918037542`.

Verified gates:

- core, including type generation, strict type-checking, lint, 174 unit tests, documentation, routing, delivery, HTTP-kernel, kernel configuration, composition, views, configuration, architecture checks, minimal-template build, reference production build and E2E smoke tests;
- PostgreSQL/Prisma validation, generation, webapp-template build and migration deployment;
- read-only runtime and network-boundary security checks;
- two-build canonical artifact reproducibility comparison.

All listed gates completed successfully. No merge to `main` occurred during verification.
